def get_page(cursor, limit=20):
    query = """
        SELECT id, created_at, title
        FROM articles
        WHERE created_at > %s
        ORDER BY created_at
        LIMIT %s
    """
    return db.execute(query, [cursor, limit])


def fetch_messages(after_id, batch_size=50):
    query = """
        SELECT id, content, sent_at
        FROM messages
        WHERE id > %s
        ORDER BY sent_at
        LIMIT %s
    """
    return db.execute(query, [after_id, batch_size])


def list_events(since_timestamp, page_size=100):
    query = """
        SELECT id, event_type, occurred_at
        FROM events
        WHERE occurred_at > %s
        ORDER BY occurred_at
        LIMIT %s
    """
    return db.execute(query, [since_timestamp, page_size])
